heading.line1: The workforce care teams asked for:

subheading: Here's what they can do for you and your patients:

cards.label: Always on
cards.description: Work 24/7, answering every call and monitoring your population.

cards.label: Multichannel communication
cards.description: Move between voice, text, chat, and email without losing context.

cards.label: Hyper personalization
cards.description: Adapt tone, timing, and approach to each patient's context and needs.

cards.label: Conversational AI
cards.description: Speak naturally in any language, adapting to local accents.

cards.label: Document processing
cards.description: Extract and parse docs through computer vision and OCR.

cards.label: Autonomous browsing
cards.description: Navigate and operate any platform, even legacy portals.

banner.label: Humans in the loop
banner.before: AI handles 99% of the busywork. Your care teams stay in control, stepping in whenever needed and owning the
